subject: [COMMON] use bitnami images for mariadb galera
commit_message:
[COMMON] use bitnami images for mariadb galera

adfinissygroup are not maintained
(https://github.com/adfinis-sygroup/openshift-mariadb-galera) and thus
we need to find maintained ones.
Bitnami seems to be a good fit.

I also changed the statefulset in order to match bitnami requirements
and started to do some templates for services, labels and PV.

Change-Id: I491b35c86d06e54e80887e084aed32adc0980cb0
Issue-ID: OOM-2235
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
